name: AL Brothers LLC
positioning: Reliable contractor support for punch lists, drywall, paint, finish work, remodeling, and exterior repairs in Greenville and Upstate SC.
audience: Builders, homeowners, property managers, and local clients who need dependable finish and repair work.
voice: Reliable, local, practical, straightforward, proof-focused, builder-friendly, homeowner-friendly.
visualStyle: Proof-of-work photos, before/after layouts, jobsite notes, clean service-area graphics.
postingFrequency: 2-4 proof posts weekly plus Google Business Profile updates for completed work.
ctaOptions: Ask about availability in Greenville or the Upstate.
imageStyleRules: Use real before/after or jobsite proof when available.
Lead with the work, not decoration.
sampleHooks: A good punch list closeout removes friction for the builder and the homeowner.
Small repairs can carry a lot of the client's first impression.
